title.en: Therefore, he could not be stupid enough to rus...

content.en:
The Dark God Society has united with the Heavenly Fire Sect, and it is an alliance in the true sense of the word, and this news has not been spread, otherwise it will definitely cause an uproar in the great universe.

And Ye Tian didn't know this news, he was still hiding in the territory near the Heavenly Fire Sect, probing the news of the Heavenly Fire Sect's Heavenly Monarchs, but unfortunately he hadn't found a chance in the recent period.

He didn't dare to enter the headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Sect, otherwise, with his strength, he might not be able to escape.

His life-saving ability is strong, but if he is really trapped, no matter how strong his life-saving means are, he can only ensure that he will not be killed, but it does not mean that he cannot be sealed.

And once he is sealed, and if the Heavenly Fire Sect uses the formation, he may be able to slowly grind him to death.

Therefore, he could not be stupid enough to rush into someone's headquarters.

"It's still a little worse in strength, if I have the strength of Senior Brother Pengyu, I can directly enter the Heavenly Fire Sect!" Ye Tian muttered.

He also thought about asking Peng Yu Tianjun to make a move, but he still dispelled this idea.

He was able to ask Senior Brother Peng Yu to protect him, because this was a reasonable request, after all, he was a Dao son of the Void Heaven One Line, and if he really encountered danger, it was normal to ask Peng Yu Tianjun to protect him.

But if you ask Peng Yu Tianjun to kill someone, this is tantamount to treating Peng Yu Tianjun as a thug.

Even if Peng Yu Tianjun has a good temper, he will be very unhappy in his heart, and he may be willing to make a move, but the affection between the two is gone.

Besides, this is his personal matter, and he doesn't want anyone else to interfere.

......

"The Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Fire Sect has actually come out!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

I just got the news that the three Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect came out of the headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Sect and went to the three places to clean up the mess.

"Traps?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Before, the Heavenly Fire Sect was forced to a very miserable point by other forces, and it didn't send people over, but this time it sent people, if it wasn't a trap, it wouldn't be like it.

"Check it out!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, he has the talent of copying, and he can detect the situation of the talent, unless the people of the Heavenly Fire Sect don't have any talent, and they can't even detect their existence, they can't hide it from Ye Tian.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled, and soon came to a giant city of the Heavenly Fire Sect, the Feather Emperor City, which was infiltrated by several forces and was in a very chaotic situation, and the Heavenly Fire Sect's Golong Heavenly Monarch came here and was dealing with the affairs here.

Ye Tian came to Yuhuang City, enveloped the whole city with his copying talent, probed everyone's talents, and quickly locked on Golong Tianjun.

A few minutes later.

Ye Tian frowned, judging from the results of the investigation, there were only two Heavenly Monarchs in this Feather Emperor City, one was the Golong Heavenly Monarch, and the other was the Heavenly Monarch of other forces, who wanted to occupy the Feather Emperor City, not the Heavenly Fire Sect Heavenly Monarch, so he was not Ye Tian's enemy.

"Is it true that the Heavenly Fire Sect only sent one Heavenly Monarch?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

He continued to explore the nearby area, and after half a month, he still did not find any trace of other Heavenly Monarchs.

Obviously, there were no other Heavenly Monarchs around here at all.

"I'm killing people very fast, even if there is an ambush in the Heavenly Fire Sect, don't try to ambush me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to assassinate.

......

The Golon Heavenly Monarch was also panicked, and it was also a helpless move to be sent here this time, although the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch informed him that they had locked on to the enemy and given him a life-saving thing, and once the enemy attacked, the help would immediately shuttle in.

His safety is assured, and with three people on the mission this time, he will not necessarily be attacked.

And once the mission is completed, the rewards are very generous.

In fact, if he had a choice, he would definitely not be willing to take risks, but there was no way, as a member of the Heavenly Fire Sect, if he dared to refuse, he would kill him without the enemy's assassination.

"I hope the enemy assassinates the other two Heavenly Monarchs, don't come to me!"

The Celestial King of Goron walked down the street, praying.

Suddenly.

An aura of despair came to him, and the time and space around him seemed to condense, and everything disappeared.

At this moment, he knew that the attack had come.

"Help me !!!"

Goron Heavenly Monarch roared inwardly.

However, the sword qi that the Yang Piercing Sword turned into passed through Golong Heavenly Monarch's body, killing him in an instant.

He never knew that the real helper was not ready to save him, because it was too late.

Even if it doesn't take time to shuttle through, it will never be able to catch up with Ye Tian's speed, unless the source hand is a true ancestor or a powerful true monarch can hope to save him in time.

Ye Tian killed Ge Long Tianjun and was about to collect the resource treasures on his body, when a world fluctuation came.

The speed of the people coming was very fast, and they shuttled in an instant.

Moreover, Ye Tian discovered through spatial fluctuations that this person was instantly shuttled from a distant territory, this was not a simple spatial means, but a chaotic supernatural power, a shuttle-type spatial chaotic supernatural power.

"Great Realm Shuttle!"

Ye Tianxia subconsciously thought of this chaotic supernatural power.

He also knows three thousand chaotic supernatural powers, even if most of them have never seen them, but he also understands the basic situation, and there are so many spatial chaotic supernatural powers, and there are not many famous spatial chaotic supernatural powers.

The Great Realm Shuttle is very famous, and the Void Heaven does not have the inheritance of this chaotic supernatural power, so Ye Tian often regrets it several times.

Therefore, he was able to recognize the chaotic supernatural power of the Great Realm Shuttle at once.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian instantly cast the space-time shifting technique, and he wanted to escape.

However, the speed of the person who came was very fast, and the reaction was faster, chasing and killing them along the spatial fluctuations of Ye Tian's space-time transfer technique.

------------

"Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch!"

Ye Tian used his copying talent to detect the Heavenly Monarch who was chasing from the rear, it was the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch, and according to his situation, this Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch should also be one of the Heavenly Monarchs of the Dark God Society, and his strength was very strong, ranking 311th on the Heavenly Monarch List, which was much stronger than the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and others.

Burst!

The Great Tearing Technique, one of the great supernatural powers, instantly slashed through Ye Tian's body, but it did not tear Ye Tian's body, and was offset by the Great Immortal Technique and the Void Heaven Dao Body.

"You are the Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch also recognized Ye Tian.

The Great Immortal Technique and the Time and Space Shifting Technique are clearly the standard configuration of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao, and the Dark God Society has long mastered this information.

Knowing Ye Tian's identity, the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch did not continue to chase and kill.

I have to admit that he can't kill Ye Tian either, and Ye Tian's space-time transfer technique is very strong, just a little slower than him, and there is no way to help Ye Tian if he continues to chase him.

The Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch is gone, and Ye Tian is not ready to stay here.

His identity has been exposed, and if he continues to assassinate, it may cause the Heavenly Fire Sect to be frantically exposed, and it will not be good to anger the Terrans at that time.
